searchProcess.robotsOrAccessNotes: Domain accessible. No bot block on visiting-students hub. WebFetch returned clean content.

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting Students | UAMS College of Medicine
candidateFindings.shortQuote: matriculated at an LCME accredited medical school, or a school of osteopathic medicine accredited by the American Osteopathic Association
candidateFindings.durationDecision: Maximum 8 weeks; usual period 4 weeks (verbatim from source)
candidateFindings.specialtyDecision: Fourth-year electives only; multispecialty (Orthopaedics, Psychiatry, EM, Neurosurgery, Pediatrics, PM&R confirmed via department pages)
caveats: SCHOOL_LEVEL_SOURCE — Page is UAMS College of Medicine visiting-students hub; UAMS Medical Center (hospital) not separately enumerated as a placement guarantee
AFFILIATION_AGREEMENT_REQUIRED — Dean/Associate Dean signed permission letter required

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting Students | UAMS College of Medicine
candidateFindings.shortQuote: may pursue elective studies at the University of Arkansas College of Medicine for no more than a total of eight (8) weeks, and the usual period is four weeks

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting Students | UAMS College of Medicine
candidateFindings.shortQuote: UAMS uses VSLO, the Visiting Student Learning Opportunities, to receive visiting student applications.

negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: Page restricts eligibility to LCME-accredited or AOA-accredited schools, which excludes non-US medical schools (IMG / international medical students) by definition. No language welcoming international students found on the hub or department pages opened.
negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: No explicit IMG-exclusion statement (the exclusion is by accreditation requirement rather than by explicit wording). Cost and visa silence is also weak negative — absence of mention, not affirmative exclusion.

nextAction: Defer to public activation. If activated, must carry SCHOOL_LEVEL_SOURCE caveat (UAMS College of Medicine, not UAMS Medical Center hospital-specific) and US_LCME_AOA_ONLY caveat. Cost must be recorded as NOT_STATED_ON_SOURCE (do not infer). No IMG / international claim permitted.
plainEnglishSummary: UAMS in Little Rock offers visiting medical student electives through VSLO. Eligibility is limited to students from US LCME-accredited or AOA-accredited medical schools, meaning IMGs and international medical students are not eligible per the source. Max 8 weeks, usually 4, MS4 only, affiliation agreement with the student's home Dean required. The source page is the UAMS College of Medicine hub, not a hospital-specific page, so any future card must say so.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because Arkansas moved from zero-coverage to one classified institution packet (UAMS) with documented audience + application + duration evidence; no noindex/backend/schema work touched.
